_comment: Whole-model decode megakernel enable table (config-driven, env-free -- see the
Eligibility (a shipped variant fits the device) is decided by
select_megakernel_num_ctas(arch, device_sms); this table is the *perf* on/off
decision layered on top of eligibility -- per (model, arch, device_sms, bucket).
The megakernel is NOT a universal win: p2/H100-SXM measured B1 1.38x but B8 0.86x,
so only buckets that are >=1.0x AND fingerprint-gated are enabled here.
Key = model kind. 'arch' is the SM major*10 (90 = sm90, 100 = sm100).
'device_sms' is the shipped variant num_sms (must match the device SM count
closest-<=-match; 132 = H100 SXM5/NVL/H200/GH200). 'buckets' = the decode batch
sizes routed through the megakernel; every other bucket runs the native decode.
An empty / missing entry => native everywhere (non-fatal fallback).

132.note: SXM: B1 1.38x (~1917us vs 2306us native). B2/B4 ~1.0x (deferred, needs B>1 per-request KV re-seed). B8 0.86x -> native.
